_comment: HUMAN-OWNED. Where each published figure came from, plus a sha256 of the exact file served. `pnpm check:figures` recomputes the hashes and fails if a figure changed without this record being updated — the site's copy of a paper figure cannot drift silently.
_limits: This verifies the file has not changed since it was recorded. It does NOT
re-run the paper's figure scripts — those live in a private repo with
untracked data. When a figure is regenerated, update `sha256` and `note`
in the same commit that replaces the image.

figures.note: Corrected build: the arXiv version renders a literal '95\%'. Regenerated 2026-07-19; no pixel inside any data panel changed.

figures.script: gravax validation figures — N=512 EFF cluster, adaptive Symmetric Hermite 6 (commit 3a11271)
figures.paperFigure: N=512 EFF cluster to 3 crossing times, with endpoint sensitivities
figures.note: PRELIMINARY. Panels (a-b): adaptive direct hierarchy with Symmetric Hermite 6 field subflows, universal Kepler binaries, r_tol=1e-6, seed 2213. Panel (c): standalone adaptive Symmetric Hermite 6 over five controlled N=32 clusters (three calibration, two held out); AD vs full finite-difference reruns agree to 3.24e-5. Exact unsoftened Newtonian forces, CPU float64. No P2MSM or FSI data appear in this figure.
PRELIMINARY. Truth-known experiment, 96 recovery mocks; hash-verified evidence bundles.
PRELIMINARY. Generated with progenax; shown on /research and /software.

figures.paperFigure: Truth vs Gaia vs Rubin colour-magnitude diagrams
figures.note: PRELIMINARY. Same synthetic population through the Gaia and Rubin forward models, including detection limits and saturation.

figures.paperFigure: Per-pixel Fisher information for IMF and binary slopes
figures.note: PRELIMINARY. Population-to-pixel differentiation is implemented; validated detector/survey transformations and global recovery are proposed work.

PRELIMINARY. Hurley SSE trajectories at Z=0.001 under weak/fiducial/strong eruptive-wind controls; panel (c) is remnant mass relative to the exact W=1 result. Rendered from a hash-verified numerical bundle; rendering reads saved data and does not rerun stellar evolution.
